WELCOME TO

EVOLOAD Migration

Migration INFORMATION

Important! (Once EVLD is migrated then SFT  will automatically be exchanged for the new boost)
  • 1. Migrate EVLD
  • 2. Continue Staking SFT
  • There is no limit for amount of EVLD to be staked.
  • EVLD can be staked anytime in every pool.
  • Limit for claim or reinvest for normal APR ( only EVLD ) is 1% from the total staked amount, if there is a SFT added for boost the limit for claim or reinvest grows at 20% for the given pool.
  • Each SFT will boost only a limited amount of EVLD$, the amount will increase monthly as the vesting schedule and the Boost APR of the SFT’S will decrease every month according to the increase in token limit with approximately 7%.
  • On each pool only one SFT can be staked for boost.
  • Unstake period for SFT is 8 days.

want to EARN MORE EVLD On new v2 ?

Migrate EVLD
